segments.text: In You, O Lord, I put my trust; Let me never be ashamed; Deliver me in Your righteousness.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Bow down Your ear to me, Deliver me speedily; Be my rock of refuge, A fortress of defense to save me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For You are my rock and my fortress; Therefore, for Your name's sake, Lead me and guide me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Pull me out of the net which they have secretly laid for me, For You are my strength.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Into Your hand I commit my spirit; You have redeemed me, O Lord God of truth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have hated those who regard useless idols; But I trust in the Lord.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will be glad and rejoice in Your mercy, For You have considered my trouble; You have known my soul in adversities,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: And have not shut me up into the hand of the enemy; You have set my feet in a wide place.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Have mercy on me, O Lord, for I am in trouble; My eye wastes away with grief, Yes, my soul and my body!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For my life is spent with grief, And my years with sighing; My strength fails because of my iniquity, And my bones waste away.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I am a reproach among all my enemies, But especially among my neighbors, And am repulsive to my acquaintances; Those who see me outside flee from me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I am forgotten like a dead man, out of mind; I am like a broken vessel.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For I hear the slander of many; Fear is on every side; While they take counsel together against me, They scheme to take away my life.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But as for me, I trust in You, O Lord; I say, You are my God.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My times are in Your hand; Deliver me from the hand of my enemies, And from those who persecute me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Make Your face shine upon Your servant; Save me for Your mercies' sake.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do not let me be ashamed, O Lord, for I have called upon You; Let the wicked be ashamed; Let them be silent in the grave.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let the lying lips be put to silence, Which speak insolent things proudly and contemptuously against the righteous.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Oh, how great is Your goodness, Which You have laid up for those who fear You, Which You have prepared for those who trust in You In the presence of the sons of men!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You shall hide them in the secret place of Your presence From the plots of man; You shall keep them secretly in a pavilion From the strife of tongues.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Blessed be the Lord, For He has shown me His marvelous kindness in a strong city!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For I said in my haste, I am cut off from before Your eyes; Nevertheless You heard the voice of my supplications When I cried out to You.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Oh, love the Lord, all you His saints! For the Lord preserves the faithful, And fully repays the proud person.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Be of good courage, And He shall strengthen your heart, All you who hope in the Lord.
segments.speaker: David
